allow: Bash(python -m pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] httpx beautifulsoup4 lxml python-dotenv pydantic pydantic-settings tenacity)
Bash(python -c "from main import app; print\('Import OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('Name:', d['profile_name']\); print\('Followers:', d['followers'], '\(', d['followers_formatted'], '\)'\); print\('Following:', d['following']\); print\('Posts:', d['total_posts']\); print\('Niche:', d['primary_niche']\); print\('Score:', d['creator_score']\); print\('Confidence:', d['confidence_score']\); print\('Bio:', \(d['bio'] or ''\)[:100]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('Name:', d.get\('profile_name'\)\); print\('Followers:', d.get\('followers'\)\); print\('Posts:', d.get\('total_posts'\)\); print\('Confidence:', d.get\('confidence_score'\)\); print\('Source:', d.get\('data_source'\)\)")
